svg.text: Azure AI Landing Zone — AI Foundry Agent Service Standard Setup
AI Landing Zone prod subscription | Hub-Spoke | 10.226.214.128/25 | Terraform Managed | Peering: scripts\setup-peering.ps1
AI Foundry Agent Service standard setup
Foundry Agent Service uses Managed Identity RBAC to access all dependencies
Storage Blob Contributor | Search Index Data Reader | Cosmos DB Contributor | KV Secrets User
All connections via Private Endpoints subnet (10.226.214.128/27)
Connections: conn-openai | conn-search | conn-cosmos (in AI Foundry Project)
Project scope: model deployments, agent runs, connection access, evaluation
Hub PE in private-endpoints subnet — public_network_access_enabled = false
Foundry MI auto-assigned: Storage Blob Contributor | Search Index Data Reader | KV Secrets User | Cognitive Services OpenAI User
AI Services virtual network (region 1 spoke, DNS provided by hub) 10.226.214.128/25
Dapr: service invocation | pub/sub | state (Cosmos DB) | secrets (Key Vault) | bindings
Apps MI RBAC: Storage Blob Contributor | Cosmos DB Contributor | KV Secrets User | Cognitive Services User
Dapr state: Cosmos DB | secrets: Key Vault | pub/sub: Service Bus
